about.summary: I'm Ismail Ouzzine, a Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience delivering 30+ impactful projects across diverse industries. Specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript, I transform complex challenges into intuitive digital experiences that drive business growth.

projects.title: ModaERP
projects.description: Built a full-featured ERP for a fashion retailer managing 200+ monthly clients — covering invoicing, inventory, payroll, and product catalog. Reduced manual billing time by 70% and consolidated five separate tools into one system.

projects.title: ModaERP · Logix
projects.description: Internal analytics add-on for ModaERP — processes and visualizes application logs in real-time, cutting average debugging time from hours to minutes and enabling proactive performance monitoring before issues reach users.

projects.title: LunchPro
projects.description: B2C food delivery platform built for corporate professionals — connects offices with local restaurants for seamless daily lunch ordering. Achieved sub-2-second order confirmation with Firebase real-time sync across web and mobile clients.

projects.title: LunchPro · Dispatch
projects.description: Real-time dispatch dashboard coordinating 50+ daily deliveries — provides live driver tracking, restaurant readiness signals, and SLA alerts so the operations team guarantees on-time delivery with full visibility.

projects.title: MFlow
projects.description: Multi-module ERP platform built for SMBs — integrates client CRM, invoicing, product management, and biometric attendance tracking. Deployed and actively used by 3 companies to manage their core daily business operations.

projects.title: HashPay
projects.description: Built a cryptocurrency payment infrastructure platform with an embeddable checkout widget supporting multi-website integration, a merchant management dashboard, analytics, webhook event system, and user role management — enabling businesses to accept and manage crypto payments with fully customizable checkout flows.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: Designed and built this portfolio using Next.js 15 with server components, Framer Motion animations, and Tailwind CSS — optimized for performance, accessibility, and SEO with a perfect Lighthouse score.

projects.title: Work With Me
projects.description: Have a project in mind? I'm currently available for freelance work and open to full-time opportunities. Let's scope your idea and build something that makes a real difference.

description: Leading frontend development of a professional label editing desktop application used across enterprise production facilities
Architected a cross-platform Electron app to replace a legacy Windows-only tool, reducing deployment from days to hours
Built high-performance React interfaces with real-time canvas rendering for sub-100ms label preview updates
Developed concurrent Scala backend services to handle parallel print job processing at scale
Designed normalized PostgreSQL schemas supporting complex label template versioning and audit trails
Contributed to a business-critical CRM platform serving 50+ call center agents over 3+ years of continuous development
Re-architected the system from a monolith to microservices, enabling the platform to scale with 10x user growth
Built real-time event pipelines with Kafka, reducing data latency from 5+ seconds to under 200ms
Developed and maintained RESTful Node.js APIs consumed by web and mobile clients supporting daily operations
Led migration of legacy PHP frontend modules to React/TypeScript, improving page load times by 60%
Managed PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases, optimizing queries to maintain sub-100ms response times at scale
Built a real-time stock management app for a retail client, replacing error-prone spreadsheet tracking across multiple locations
Implemented Firebase real-time sync giving store managers live inventory visibility — eliminating stock discrepancies overnight
Designed Firestore schemas supporting sub-100ms queries across 10,000+ inventory items
Delivered fully responsive, cross-browser compatible interfaces covering all major browsers and mobile devices
Delivered two full-stack applications within a 3-month engagement — a B2B advertising platform and an online phone book
Built PHP/Lumen REST APIs and Angular 6+ frontend for the advertising platform, handling hundreds of daily listings
Integrated ElasticSearch delivering sub-50ms search response times across the full listing database
Set up LogStash for centralized log monitoring, significantly reducing mean time to detect production issues
Built the phone book application independently using Node.js and MongoDB with full-text search across thousands of entries
